content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Data Analytics for Cyber Security is for cybersecurity students and professionals interested in learning data science approaches that are crucial for addressing cybersecurity challenges, as well as data science students and professionals interested in learning about cybersecurity adaptations. Are you attempting to create a virus detector, a phishing email detector, or simply looking for trends in your datasets.
Contenu de la matière
Basics and Security Analytics
Fundamental data analytics using Python
Statistics for cyber security
Unsupervised Learning for cyber security
Supervised Learning for cyber security
Packet analysis for security
Network package analysis and DDoS attacks
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
Security Analytics A Data Centric Approach to Information Security, Mehak Khurana, Shilpa Mahajan
Cybersecurity Analytics, Rakesh M. Verma, David J. Marchette
